title: Poisonous Potato Potions
description: Adding brewable poisonous potatoes for potions of poison.
body:
## How to use
Put a [**Poisonous Potato**](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Poisonous_Potato) in a [**Brewing Stand**](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Brewing_Stand) with a [**Water Bottle**](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Potion#Base_potions) and it will create a [**Potion of Poison**](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Potion#Potion_of_Poison).

## Notes
This mod was created for use in my personal modpacks but anyone can use it now.

I felt like the poisonous potato is lacking purpose.

I remember a qoute saying: "Everything added to minecraft must have a purpose." 

dont remember who said it but it seemed to have lost its meaning past version 1.0
